data.title: Coppernico updates Sombrero Option Agreement with Aceros to advance permits for drilling; includes 3 key concessions.
data.description: In Vancouver, British Columbia, on September 25, 2025, Coppernico Metals Inc. disclosed that it has made amendments to agreements related to its existing option with Aceros Arequipa S.A. The company's wholly owned Peruvian subsidiary, Sombrero Minerales SAC, finalized the Amendments in relation to the Aceros Option, encompassing three crucial concessions covering Nioc and Fierrazo. These two areas are considered cornerstone targets within the expansive copper-gold Sombrero Project located in Peru. Coppernico Metals Inc. is listed on the TSX under COPR, OTCQB as CPPMF, and FSE as 9I3.

data.title: Innovative Health sponsors hotline for reporting Johnson & Johnson MedTech non-compliance with injunction.
data.description: Johnson & Johnson MedTech is mandated to inform customers and employees about the hotline's availability due to the injunction against anti-reprocessing activities. The announcement was made by Innovative Health, Inc. in Scottsdale, Arizona on September 25, 2025. The hotline is a crucial resource for individuals seeking information or reporting issues related to medical device reprocessing.

data.title: Vaughn College ranks high in social mobility, best value, and engineering, in 2026 US News college rankings.
data.description: Vaughn College has achieved significant success in the 2026 Regional North Rankings. The institution has emerged at the top for social mobility, showcasing its dedication to providing opportunities for upward movement. Additionally, Vaughn College has made strides in the best value category, indicating its commitment to offering quality education at an affordable cost. Furthermore, the college has been acknowledged for its excellence in engineering, solidifying its reputation as a leader in this field. These accolades reflect Vaughn College's continuous efforts to excel across various disciplines and provide a supportive environment for students.

data.title: Dr. Jennifer Buell of MiNK Therapeutics to speak at 10th Annual CAR-TCR Summit in Boston, MA. Nasdaq: INKT. #biopharma
data.description: In a recent announcement, MiNK Therapeutics, Inc. revealed that their President and CEO, Dr. Jennifer Buell, is set to deliver a keynote speech at the 10th Annual CAR-TCR Summit in Boston, MA. The event, scheduled for September 23-26, 2025, will focus on advancements in the field of invariant natural killer T (iNKT) cell therapies. MiNK Therapeutics, Inc., listed on Nasdaq as INKT, is a leading biopharmaceutical company in the clinical stage, specializing in this innovative area. Dr. Jennifer Buell's participation highlights the company's prominence in this sector.

data.title: Sanolla introduces AI-powered VoqX smart stethoscope for clinicians, offering full-spectrum auscultation. FDA-certified.
data.description: Sanolla, a premier provider of advanced auscultation and AI-driven diagnostic solutions, has announced the commencement of direct sales for their FDA-certified VoqX product. This move aims to equip clinicians with cutting-edge diagnostic capabilities. The company, based in Houston, unveiled this initiative on September 25, 2025. The VoqX smart technology is designed to enhance clinical practice by harnessing the power of artificial intelligence.

data.title: DeFi Technologies invests in and partners with Canada Stablecorp to scale QCAD, a Canadian dollar stablecoin rail. Other investors include Coinbase Ventures, Circle Ventures, Side Door Ventures, and industry leaders.
data.description: DeFi Technologies has made a strategic investment and formed a partnership with Canada Stablecorp to support the growth of QCAD, a stablecoin pegged to the Canadian dollar. Alongside DeFi Technologies, investors in Stablecorp include prominent names such as Coinbase Ventures, Circle Ventures, Side Door Ventures, and other key players in the industry. This collaboration aims to further develop and expand QCAD as an essential component of the stablecoin ecosystem, leveraging the backing and expertise of various industry leaders.

data.title: Anebulo Pharmaceuticals begins phase 1 study on intravenous Selonabant for acute cannabis toxicity, funded by NIDA.
data.description: In Austin, Texas, Anebulo Pharmaceuticals, Inc. (Nasdaq: ANEB) has initiated dosing of the first subjects in a Phase 1 single ascending dose study of intravenous (IV) selonabant in healthy young adults. Anebulo focuses on developing solutions for acute cannabinoid-induced toxicities. The study has received backing from the National Institute on Drug Abuse (NIDA). This marks an important milestone for the company's clinical-stage biopharmaceutical endeavors in this field.

data.title: Postal Realty Trust appoints Steve Bakke as CFO, effective Nov 5, 2025. Company owns 2,200 properties leased to USPS.
data.description: In Cedarhurst, New York on September 25, 2025, Postal Realty Trust, Inc. (NYSE: PSTL) declared the hiring of Steve Bakke as Executive Vice President, Chief Financial Officer, and Principal Financial Officer for the Company. The real estate investment trust currently owns and oversees more than 2,200 properties rented primarily to the United States Postal Service (USPS), encompassing last-mile post offices to industrial facilities. Bakke will start his new roles around November 5, 2025, and will operate from the Company's Cedarhurst, NY headquarters.

data.title: Publication urges fashion leaders to accelerate action with Fashion CEO Agenda 2025 at NY Climate Week.
data.description: During New York Climate Week, Global Fashion Agenda (GFA) introduced the Fashion CEO Agenda 2025, offering strategic guidance for fashion industry leaders. This resource aims to prompt urgent action to safeguard businesses in light of environmental challenges. The agenda outlines key priorities and recommendations for CEOs, emphasizing sustainability and resilience. This initiative comes as a response to the growing urgency of climate change and sustainability concerns in the industry. The Fashion CEO Agenda 2025 is set to address crucial issues in the sector and steer companies towards a more sustainable and responsible future.

data.title: ETHFI price at $1.56 on bullish trend despite 3.35% daily dip. Strong signals hint at recovery from recent pullback.
data.description: The liquid staking token ETHFI is currently trading at $1.56, showing bullish technical indicators that point towards a potential recovery from a recent pullback. Strong momentum signals are emerging, indicating positive movement in the token's value.

data.title: Carolinas AGC leaders advocate for workforce relief on Capitol Hill in 2025, collaborating with AGC of America during NCLC.
data.description: In September 25, 2025, in Charlotte, North Carolina, five officers from the Carolinas Associated General Contractors (AGC) Board of Directors, accompanied by AGC staff, traveled to Washington, D.C. for the AGC of America's National Chapter & Leadership Conference (NCLC). During the conference, they had meetings with members of the U.S. Senate and House of Representatives.
Denmark says recent drone incursions over multiple airports were carried out by a "professional actor" in a "systematic" hybrid attack but found no evidence linking them to Russia.

data.title: Cryptocurrency market in decline, with Ethereum below $4,000. Notable stats: 134,702 traders liquidated, $427.63 million lost. Bitcoin $111,576.43, Ethereum $4,009.45, XRP $2.81, Dogecoin $0.2319. Bitcoin cycle analysis suggests nearing end or transitioning to gradual bull phase.
data.description: The cryptocurrency markets faced another decline on Thursday, with Ethereum falling below $4,000 during overnight trading. The current prices for the top cryptocurrencies are as follows: Bitcoin at $111,576.43, Ethereum at $4,009.45, Solana at $201.84, XRP at $2.81, Dogecoin at $0.2319, and Shiba Inu at $0.00001186. In the last 24 hours, 134,702 traders were liquidated, resulting in losses totaling $427.63 million, as reported by Coinglass. Data from SoSoValue indicates that spot Bitcoin ETFs saw net outflows of $241 million on Wednesday, while spot Ethereum ETFs experienced outflows of $79.4 million. Analysts, like crypto trader Jelle, have noted that Bitcoin cycles historically last around 1,064 days from the market bottom. With only about 30 days left in the current cycle, it remains uncertain whether it is approaching its end or shifting into a more extended bullish phase. For more details, visit Benzinga.com.

data.title: Study by ZAP Surgical Systems shows varying radiation doses in brain across radiosurgery platforms.
data.description: A company based in San Carlos, California, ZAP Surgical Systems, Inc., has introduced a new study titled “A Comparison of Whole Brain Dose During Multiple Metastases Stereotactic Radiosurgery Delivery Across Technology Platforms.” This study was published with collaboration from prominent professionals at Stanford University, Miami Cancer Institute, and others. The research focuses on the ZAP-X® Gyroscopic Radiosurgery® platform created by the company. The study compares the whole brain dose during multiple metastases stereotactic radiosurgery delivery across various technology platforms. This study features inputs from leading neurosurgeons, radiation oncologists, and medical physicists.

data.title: Capricor Therapeutics provides regulatory update on Deramiocel for DMD after FDA Type A meeting, post CRL in July 2025.
data.description: San Diego, CA - Capricor Therapeutics (NASDAQ: CAPR) revealed a recent regulatory update regarding its Biologics License Application (BLA) for Deramiocel, an investigational cell therapy targeting Duchenne muscular dystrophy (DMD). Following a Type A meeting with the U.S. Food and Drug Administration (FDA) subsequent to receiving a Complete Response Letter (CRL) in July 2025, significant developments are underway. Capricor focuses on pioneering cell and exosome-based treatments for rare diseases. Stay tuned for further updates on this promising therapy.
